name: Contribution Score
summary: Measures each user's comment quality based on votes received, with configurable penalties for self-promotion and optional bonuses for proposal-owner endorsements.
description:
### What it measures
Measures the value each user contributes through comments. Every eligible comment earns points, and the user's final score is the sum of all their comment-level results.

### How scoring works
- Each eligible comment starts with a configurable base score.
- Upvotes add to the score; downvotes subtract from it.
- Comments on your own proposals or replies to yourself can be penalized.
- An optional bonus multiplier applies when the proposal owner upvoted the comment.
- An optional monthly decay rate reduces the influence of older comments.

### Data source
No file upload is required. The algorithm reads proposals, comments, users, and comment votes directly from the DeepFunding Portal.

### Output files
- A per-user CSV with `user_id` and `contribution_score`.
- A JSON details file with per-comment scoring breakdowns for auditing.

inputs.label: Base Score Per Comment
inputs.description: Starting points awarded to every eligible comment before upvote/downvote effects, penalties, bonuses, and decay are applied.

inputs.label: Upvote Weight
inputs.description: How much each upvote increases a comment's score. Higher values reward popular comments more strongly.

inputs.label: Downvote Weight
inputs.description: How much each downvote decreases a comment's score. Higher values penalize negatively-received comments more strongly.

inputs.label: Self-Interaction Penalty
inputs.description: Score multiplier applied when a comment is on the author's own proposal or is a self-reply. `1` disables the penalty; `0` zeroes out self-interactions entirely.

inputs.label: Proposal Owner Upvote Bonus
inputs.description: Score multiplier applied when the proposal owner upvoted the comment. `1` disables the bonus; higher values give extra credit for endorsements from proposal owners.

inputs.label: Lookback Window (Months)
inputs.description: Only comments created within this many months before the snapshot are scored. Comments older than this window are ignored entirely.

inputs.label: Monthly Decay Rate (%)
inputs.description: Percentage by which a comment's score is reduced for each month of age. Set to `0` to treat all comments within the window equally.

outputs.label: Contribution Score (CSV)
outputs.description: One row per user with columns: `user_id` and `contribution_score`.

outputs.label: Contribution Score Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Per-comment scoring breakdown with intermediate values for each user, useful for auditing results.
